AssociateWebACL.description: Grants permission to associate a WebACL with a resource

CheckCapacity.description: Grants permission to calculate web ACL capacity unit (WCU) requirements for a specified scope and set of rules

CreateAPIKey.description: Grants permission to create an API key for use in the integration of the CAPTCHA API in your JavaScript client applications

CreateIPSet.description: Grants permission to create an IPSet

CreateRegexPatternSet.description: Grants permission to create a RegexPatternSet

CreateRuleGroup.description: Grants permission to create a RuleGroup

CreateWebACL.description: Grants permission to create a WebACL

DeleteAPIKey.description: Grants permission to delete an API key

DeleteFirewallManagerRuleGroups.description: Grants permission to delete FirewallManagedRulesGroups from a WebACL if not managed by Firewall Manager anymore

DeleteIPSet.description: Grants permission to delete an IPSet

DeleteLoggingConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete the LoggingConfiguration from a WebACL

DeletePermissionPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the PermissionPolicy on a RuleGroup

DeleteRegexPatternSet.description: Grants permission to delete a RegexPatternSet

DeleteRuleGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a RuleGroup

DeleteWebACL.description: Grants permission to delete a WebACL

DescribeAllManagedProducts.description: Grants permission to retrieve product information for a managed rule group

DescribeManagedProductsByVendor.description: Grants permission to retrieve product information for a managed rule group by a given vendor

DescribeManagedRuleGroup.description: Grants permission to retrieve high-level information for a managed rule group

DisassociateFirewallManager.description: Grants permission to disassociate Firewall Manager from a WebACL

DisassociateWebACL.description: Grants permission to disassociate a WebACL from an application resource

GenerateMobileSdkReleaseUrl.description: Grants permission to generate a presigned download URL for the specified release of the mobile SDK

GetDecryptedAPIKey.description: Grants permission to return your API key in decrypted form. Use this to check the token domains that you have defined for the key

GetIPSet.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about an IPSet

GetLoggingConfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve LoggingConfiguration for a WebACL

GetManagedRuleSet.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about a ManagedRuleSet

GetMobileSdkRelease.description: Grants permission to retrieve information for the specified mobile SDK release, including release notes and tags

GetPermissionPolicy.description: Grants permission to retrieve a PermissionPolicy for a RuleGroup

GetRateBasedStatementManagedKeys.description: Grants permission to retrieve the keys that are currently blocked by a rate-based rule

GetRegexPatternSet.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about a RegexPatternSet

GetRuleGroup.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about a RuleGroup

GetSampledRequests.description: Grants permission to retrieve detailed information about a sampling of web requests

GetTopPathStatisticsByTraffic.description: Grants permission to retrieve aggregated path statistics with bot traffic analysis for a WebACL within a specified time window

GetWebACL.description: Grants permission to retrieve details about a WebACL

GetWebACLForResource.description: Grants permission to retrieve the WebACL that's associated with a resource

ListAPIKeys.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of the API keys that you've defined for the specified scope

ListAvailableManagedRuleGroupVersions.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of managed rule group versions that are available for you to use

ListAvailableManagedRuleGroups.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of managed rule groups that are available for you to use

ListIPSets.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of IPSetSummary objects for the IP sets that you manage

ListLoggingConfigurations.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of your LoggingConfiguration objects

ListManagedRuleSets.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of your ManagedRuleSet objects

ListMobileSdkReleases.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of the available releases for the mobile SDK and the specified device platform

ListRegexPatternSets.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of RegexPatternSetSummary objects for the regex pattern sets that you manage

ListResourcesForWebACL.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of the Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) for the resources that are associated with a web ACL

ListRuleGroups.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of RuleGroupSummary objects for the rule groups that you manage

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

ListWebACLs.description: Grants permission to retrieve an array of WebACLSummary objects for the web ACLs that you manage

PutFirewallManagerRuleGroups.description: Grants permission to create FirewallManagedRulesGroups in a WebACL

PutLoggingConfiguration.description: Grants permission to enable a LoggingConfiguration, to start logging for a web ACL

PutManagedRuleSetVersions.description: Grants permission to enable create a new or update an existing version of a ManagedRuleSet

PutPermissionPolicy.description: Grants permission to attach an IAM policy to a resource, used to share rule groups between accounts

TagResource.description: Grants permission to associate tags with a AWS resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to disassociate tags from an AWS resource

UpdateIPSet.description: Grants permission to update an IPSet

UpdateManagedRuleSetVersionExpiryDate.description: Grants permission to update the expiry date of a version in ManagedRuleSet

UpdateRegexPatternSet.description: Grants permission to update a RegexPatternSet

UpdateRuleGroup.description: Grants permission to update a RuleGroup

UpdateWebACL.description: Grants permission to update a WebACL

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag-value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of mandatory tags in the request

wafv2:LogDestinationResource.description: Filters access by log destination ARN for PutLoggingConfiguration API

wafv2:LogScope.description: Filters access by log scope for Logging Configuration API
